hero.description: I'm Dev Kumar, a Full Stack Developer from India who enjoys building scalable web applications and exploring Web3 technologies. I work with modern frameworks and love solving complex problems with clean and efficient code.

education.title: Education
education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: I have experience with the following technologies: React, Node.js, Express.js, Django, SQL, Python, and C++.

projects.title: Modern E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full stack e-commerce application built with React, Node.js, Express, and SQL. It includes product management, authentication, cart system, and secure payment integration.

projects.title: Restaurant & Food Delivery System
projects.description: A scalable system similar to Zomato with restaurant management, order tracking, and payment strategies. Implemented using design patterns like Factory, Strategy, and Singleton.

projects.title: Smart Dashboard System
projects.description: A real-time dashboard for monitoring analytics and system metrics with interactive UI and API integration.

projects.title: Crypto Dashboard
projects.description: A web application that fetches cryptocurrency data using APIs and displays real-time prices using multithreading and secure API handling.

description: Developed scalable full stack applications using React, Node.js, and Express improving system performance and maintainability.
Built REST APIs and integrated them with modern frontend frameworks to create responsive web applications.
Collaborated with development teams to implement features, fix bugs, and optimize application performance.

contact.title: About
contact.description:
Hi, I'm Dev Kumar, a Computer Science student at Narula Institute of Technology graduating in 2027. I am passionate about Full Stack Development, Data Structures & Algorithms, and Web3 technologies.

I have experience building scalable web applications using React, Node.js, Express, Django, and SQL. I also enjoy solving algorithmic problems in C++ and designing efficient backend systems.

Currently, I am working as a Full Stack Developer Intern at Future Inters and focusing on improving my system design and blockchain development skills.
contact.contact_message: I'm open to new opportunities, internships, and collaborations. Feel free to reach out!
